title: Fix header overlapping hero image and update header tagline text

requirements.summary: Update the header tagline bar text to display 'Delicious Mexican food for every special occasion'
acceptanceCriteria: The tagline bar in the header displays exactly 'Delicious Mexican food for every special occasion'
No other header content or layout is changed

file_operations.description:
Update the tagline text in the header tagline bar (the div with className containing 'bg-chili-600 text-cream-50') from the current text to 'Delicious Mexican food for every special occasion'. Locate the

element inside the tagline bar and replace its text content.

requirements.summary: Fix the fixed header so it no longer overlaps the hero section image, ensuring the girl image is fully visible
acceptanceCriteria: The girl/hero image is fully visible and not covered by the header at any point on page load
The header remains functional (navigation, mobile menu) and visually consistent
The hero section content starts below the header, with no clipping of the hero image at the top

file_operations.description: Add top padding or margin to the hero section container to account for the fixed header height (approximately 128px total: 40px tagline bar + 88px main header). Ensure the hero background image and all content start below the header by adding appropriate spacing to the outermost container div. The background image positioning should be adjusted so the top of the image is visible below the header.

Review the header's fixed positioning and z-index to ensure it sits above other content but does not visually obstruct the hero image. Verify that the header height calculations are correct and that the mobile menu behavior remains functional. No structural changes to navigation or layout are needed, only validation of positioning behavior.
